PublicDescription: The Event counts CPU clock cycles, when the PE is not in WFE/WFI. The clock measured by this Event is defined as the physical clock driving the CPU logic.
The Event increments at a constant frequency equal to the rate of increment of the System Counter, CNTPCT_EL0. This Event does not increment when the PE is in WFE/WFI.

Entitled CPU slots. The Event counts the number of slots. When in ST mode, this Event shall increment by PMMIR_EL1.SLOTS quantities, and when in SMT partitioned resource mode (regardless of in WFI state or otherwise), this Event is incremented by PMMIR_EL1.SLOTS/2 quantities.
